sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_auditrecord_t (cdtid,examineman,examinetime,examineopinion,result) VALUES ($cdtid$,'$examineman$','$examinetime$','$examineopinion$','$result$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from e_auditrecord_t where cdtid=$cdtid$ order by examinetime desc
select * from e_auditrecord_t where cdtid=$cdtid$ order by examinetime desc
